subject: Support President Trump & Stop the Madness!
body:
Impeachment is a hoax. It’s a waste of time. It’s another example of the far-left socialist Democrats unwillingness to accept the outcome of the... |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=64830a9eb1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Dear Hoosier Republican,

Impeachment is a hoax. It’s a waste of time. It’s another example of the far-left socialist Democrats **unwillingness** to accept the outcome of the 2016 election.

Impeachment is an **embarrassment** to our country and demonstrates that Pelosi, Schiff, Schumer, “The Squad” and the other Democrats will stop at nothing to stymie the progress President Trump is making for the American people.
[WE NEED YOUR SUPPORT TO STOP THE MADNESS AND ELECT MORE REPUBLICANS!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fe06f87c40&e=1acd9bb3d6)
While the Democrats are fighting for facetime on CNN or MSNBC, President Trump and the Republicans **are fighting FOR YOU!**

Think about it. The Democrats have done nothing, but are obsessed with their impeachment hoax because President Trump is delivering results for all Americans. And he will do **even more** when we **REELECT** President Trump and **flip the House** back to the GOP!
[PLEASE DONATE NOW AND HELP INDIANA SEND REPUBLICAN ALLIES TO WASHINGTON THAT WILL SUPPORT THE PRESIDENT. ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=68abbc09b9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
The **United States is on a roll** under President Trump’s leadership:
* Seven million new jobs
* The largest tax cuts and reforms in history
* Over 180 conservative judges to the federal bench, including two Supreme Court Justices
* More Americans are working now than ever before
* Over 2.4 million Americans are out of poverty
* A stronger southern border with construction of The Wall
* President Trump has acted to lower prescription drug costs, attack addiction, negotiate better trade deals and rebuild our military!

Make no mistake, this **sham impeachment** is an attempt by the Democrats to **distract you** from the positive work President Trump and his fellow Republicans are doing.

We can send a message to Pelosi, Schiff, Sanders, Warren and the other **unhinged socialists** in DC by sending Republican Reinforcements to Washington and building on the progress President Trump is making.
[SUPPORT HOOSIER REPUBLICANS WHO WILL HELP PRESIDENT TRUMP CONTINUE TO DELIVER FOR ALL AMERICANS.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=149137fad8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Thank you,
-Your Indiana Republican Party

name: MJ Hegar
subject: A personal note

body:
I want to tell you a little more about why I decided to get into this race.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904e9/7f51f7bc/4ab9d829/4ef07395/339543510/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

Running for Senate wasn't the obvious path for me. I'm not a politician, I have two little kids, and look, most of what happens in Washington _really_ makes me mad. So I want to tell you a little more about why I decided to get into this race **([If you're with me already, you can make a donation here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904e9/7f51f7bc/4ab9d829/4ef07394/339543510/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc5NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200122.2nd__795__&amount=10&recurring=true"))**.

Senator John Cornyn is an entrenched incumbent who's spent nearly two decades in Washington serving special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell. Now, thanks in part to Big Pharma, the gun lobby, and the private prison industry, he has a nearly $11 million war chest -- and outside special interests are spending even more on his behalf.

**After 18 years, I don 't expect Sen. Cornyn to start putting Texas first anytime soon. That's why I had to get into this race. [Will you pitch in now to help us win the upcoming Texas primary and take on Sen. Cornyn from the strongest position possible?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904e9/7f51f7bc/4ab9d829/4ef07394/339543510/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc5NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200122.2nd__795__&amount=10&recurring=true")** **[**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904e9/7f51f7bc/4ab9d829/4ef07394/339543510/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc5NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200122.2nd__795__&amount=10&recurring=true")** In the last few years alone, Sen. Cornyn:
* Voted to rip health care away from millions of Texans.
* Voted against a bill that would've lowered prescription drug prices.
* And refused to support any meaningful action on gun violence, even after horrific mass shootings in our own state.

I intend to do things differently. **I will fight for you tooth and nail every single day**. My votes will always be based on what's best for Texans and NEVER who's writing the biggest campaign checks. As the only political outsider in the race and a working mom who has personally faced the struggles working Texans deal with every day, you can be sure of that.

**If you 're ready for a senator who will put you first, I need you to pitch in so we can take on Sen. Cornyn and his special interest allies:** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Join me in standing for life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c01a4bdc176c/for-immediate-release-kansas-state-treasurer-jake-laturner-announces-candidacy-for-us-congress-6185437?e=1050d051da)
---
| |
---
| | Today marks the 47th anniversary of the Roe v. Wade decision legalizing the barbaric practice of killing unborn babies. It was not the right thing to do then, and it is not the right thing to do now. Life is the only right choice.

Our Kansas Supreme Court does not agree with protecting life, and last year issued a ruling stating the Kansas Constitution contains a right to abortion. Those who value life, as I do, don’t see it that way.

Today we all came together to rally on behalf of the unborn.[ It was remarkable to stand with my fellow Kansans who share my strong support for regulating the abortion industry.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5bf651f1b5&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
The Kansas Pro-Life Coalition and many of our Kansas legislators are working hard to get an [amendment on the ballot in August that will allow Kansans to block the Supreme Court’s ruling and allow regulations to be placed on the abortion industry in our state for the safety of both women and babies](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d9ce3fe6b6&e=1050d051da). The people must be allowed to decide how to regulate abortion in Kansas, not the courts.
| |
---
We must never stop fighting for those that cannot fight for themselves. The most vulnerable among us deserve to have us looking out for them. [I stand for life, and I encourage you to join me in praying for the over 63-million lives that have been lost to abortion and for the protection of those still waiting to be born.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d62f650e54&e=1050d051da)

Yours in the fight,

Jake LaTurner

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 5 times Adam Schiff just totally made it up today
body:
Schiff is the worst choice to put in front of Americans fed up with Washington’s partisan circus. His only real priority is attacking President Trump. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1d267aa16f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 22, 2020
---
| | |
# **5 times Adam Schiff just totally made it up today**

**Democrats have based** their whole impeachment sham on the word and judgement of Rep. Adam Schiff (D-CA), who pleaded the left’s case for 2 1⁄2 hours before the Senate today. Spoiler alert: That wasn’t a good idea.

**Schiff is the worst choice** to put in front of Americans fed up with Washington’s partisan circus. His only real priority is attacking President Trump, and he’s more than happy to resort to lies, leaks, and whatever else it takes to do it.

**In September** , during a House Intelligence Committee hearing, Schiff made headlines by fabricating a completely made-up version of the July 25th phone call between President Trump and President Zelenskyy of Ukraine. Then, news broke that Schiff’s staff had behind-the-scenes contact with the “whistleblower” at the center of the impeachment probe _before_ that complaint was ever even filed.

**“We have not spoken** directly with the whistleblower,” Schiff had claimed before the truth caught up with him. Oops—not the best person to stake Democrats’ credibility on.

**Today was no different**. Schiff’s one-sided impeachment report—the document that serves as the basis for Democrats’ entire case—is nothing but a partisan hatchet job. Rather than draw more attention to their flimsy, fake “investigation,” Schiff chose to deflect and make up more lies about President Trump. Here are a few of the biggest ones:
* Schiff claims that President Trump endorsed the theory that Russia did not interfere in the 2016 election. **FACT** : [President Trump has publicly said](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e51924c518&e=3ee4985eea), very clearly, that he accepts the conclusion of the intelligence community that Russia interfered in 2016.

* Schiff says that President Trump withheld an Oval Office meeting from President Zelenskyy. **FACT** : [President Trump invited President Zelenskyy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1a0f6a8e7b&e=3ee4985eea) to the White House—with no preconditions—on THREE occasions: April 21, May 29, and July 25. They met at the first opportunity, at the UN General Assembly.

* Schiff once again brought up claims of a “quid pro quo.” **FACT** : [Notice what’s not in Democrats’ articles of impeachment?](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7e4c157f12&e=3ee4985eea) Allegations or accusations of a quid pro quo. They couldn’t include that claim—because no such arrangement existed.

* BONUS: [Schiff completely misrepresented](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=62a4cdba5b&e=3ee4985eea) what Acting Chief of Staff Mick Mulvaney said about foreign policy, Chris Wallace says.

**For years** , Schiff lied about the Russia hoax, claiming there was evidence of collusion only to be proven wrong by the Mueller Report. This time, House Democrats learned their lesson: Why risk letting the facts get in the way? Impeach first, investigate later—or beg the Senate to do it for them.
---
|
---
|
## **In better news: The great American comeback story! **
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=07895499f7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Trump traveled** to Davos, Switzerland, this week for the World Economic Forum. The annual meeting brings together leaders from across the globe to discuss improving economic stability and unleashing prosperity for more people worldwide.

**As he always does** on the world stage, President Trump made his priority clear: The needs of the American people come first. His meetings with leaders from the European Union, Iraq, Afghanistan, and more will help America continue to protect its citizens and secure better trade deals for its workers.

**America also has a story** to tell. “When I spoke at this forum two years ago, I told you that we had launched the great American comeback,” President Trump said. “Today, I’m proud to declare that the United States is in the midst of an economic boom the likes of which the world has never seen before.”

[Watch President Trump’s full speech at Davos.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fa3bd1af60&e=3ee4985eea)

**Promise Made, Promise Kept:** [NAFTA replacement coming to POTUS’ desk! ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f92dc3388c&e=3ee4985eea)

clean_body: Schiff is the worst choice to put in front of Americans fed up with Washington’s partisan circus. His only real priority is attacking President Trump. | | | | | The White House • January 22, 2020 | | | 5 times Adam Schiff just totally made it up today Democrats have based their whole impeachment sham on the word and judgement of Rep. Adam Schiff (D-CA), who pleaded the left’s case for 2 1⁄2 hours before the Senate today. Spoiler alert: That wasn’t a good idea. Schiff is the worst choice to put in front of Americans fed up with Washington’s partisan circus. His only real priority is attacking President Trump, and he’s more than happy to resort to lies, leaks, and whatever else it takes to do it. In September , during a House Intelligence Committee hearing, Schiff made headlines by fabricating a completely made-up version of the July 25th phone call between President Trump and President Zelenskyy of Ukraine. Then, news broke that Schiff’s staff had behind-the-scenes contact with the “whistleblower” at the center of the impeachment probe before that complaint was ever even filed. “We have not spoken directly with the whistleblower,” Schiff had claimed before the truth caught up with him. Oops—not the best person to stake Democrats’ credibility on. Today was no different. Schiff’s one-sided impeachment report—the document that serves as the basis for Democrats’ entire case—is nothing but a partisan hatchet job. Rather than draw more attention to their flimsy, fake “investigation,” Schiff chose to deflect and make up more lies about President Trump. Here are a few of the biggest ones: Schiff claims that President Trump endorsed the theory that Russia did not interfere in the 2016 election. FACT : , very clearly, that he accepts the conclusion of the intelligence community that Russia interfered in 2016. Schiff says that President Trump withheld an Oval Office meeting from President Zelenskyy. FACT : to the White House—with no preconditions—on THREE occasions: April 21, May 29, and July 25. They met at the first opportunity, at the UN General Assembly. Schiff once again brought up claims of a “quid pro quo.” FACT : Allegations or accusations of a quid pro quo. They couldn’t include that claim—because no such arrangement existed. BONUS: what Acting Chief of Staff Mick Mulvaney said about foreign policy, Chris Wallace says. For years , Schiff lied about the Russia hoax, claiming there was evidence of collusion only to be proven wrong by the Mueller Report. This time, House Democrats learned their lesson: Why risk letting the facts get in the way? Impeach first, investigate later—or beg the Senate to do it for them. | | In better news: The great American comeback story! | | President Trump traveled to Davos, Switzerland, this week for the World Economic Forum. The annual meeting brings together leaders from across the globe to discuss improving economic stability and unleashing prosperity for more people worldwide. As he always does on the world stage, President Trump made his priority clear: The needs of the American people come first. His meetings with leaders from the European Union, Iraq, Afghanistan, and more will help America continue to protect its citizens and secure better trade deals for its workers. America also has a story to tell. “When I spoke at this forum two years ago, I told you that we had launched the great American comeback,” President Trump said. “Today, I’m proud to declare that the United States is in the midst of an economic boom the likes of which the world has never seen before.” Promise Made, Promise Kept: | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

body:
Eric Holcomb is the third most popular Holcomb... behind his wife Janet and their dog Henry. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d1515da9d6a64a299e31a014f5ca9047&_e=2TZRE75x62I5EuHyMbFXSo5gLaR-8TGHLuFJOn9bMFr42b7Bz6NjaZ3fv14je9-bY-JvC9c0HTtddsbJDPTbkyK7vAQLTBV6nXFK1FQLPsbA3R_GtKiclusEeeCPmplIazgx8UQJhPBlKTF-0W9m09g69jSuIr3jZmXPlN4QVSh4IAIDBzz4IvD8RM7qLN_R0ARY4TwkHUramW561KpxDqqUHRD8pQs329Agcmyc5EXtD7knE5mdGM8mbCNq3hu_dWX63grTvid5t-BB6xi_93YwRf2YjAsxads4v_XzT9QN9GHYAcoRDeNhcSOl5hkWRVy02i2YInA7_OmUvNepJ-0JOr0ldLejxudas9O-8O-Qz_7YQOm-ghuPgRoqOZhBMZBSrZLMrMo8NMP_-AfhHwhdGcD7ShDneVoUn5PAVls%3D) Friend, **Eric Holcomb is the third most popular Holcomb... behind his wife Janet and their dog Henry.**

The governor has made his peace with that, as Henry has become quite a popular Hoosier canine over these last few years.
In fact, Henry travels Indiana ALMOST as much as the governor does! For this week’s One Indiana list, we wanted to share some of the governor’s favorite Henry moments complete with pictures... because who doesn’t like photos of dogs?

clean_body: Eric Holcomb is the third most popular Holcomb... behind his wife Janet and their dog Henry. Friend, Eric Holcomb is the third most popular Holcomb... behind his wife Janet and their dog Henry. The governor has made his peace with that, as Henry has become quite a popular Hoosier canine over these last few years. In fact, Henry travels Indiana ALMOST as much as the governor does! For this week’s One Indiana list, we wanted to share some of the governor’s favorite Henry moments complete with pictures... because who doesn’t like photos of dogs? Check out Governor Holcomb’s Top 10 Henry moments below: 1\. SATURN dog food : Henry took part in the recent Saturn Petcare announcement — celebrating the beginning of a $38 million project and the addition of 200 new jobs. 2.Henry on Jeopardy!: Indiana's favorite Schnauzer made an unlikely appearance on Jeopardy! 3. Henry helped with anengagement proposal and was featured in a New York Times story. 4. Henry and Governor Holcomb took a special walk through Holcomb Gardens on Butler University's campus. 5. Henry helped Hoosier kids learn by starring in an Indiana Department of Natural Resources coloring book. 6. Henry toured Purdue Veterinary teaching hospital, where his dad helped secure funding for new teaching hospital facilities. 7. Henry makes an appearance on RTV 6...and gives a surprise interview! 8. Henry appears in the Indy Star's "Let It Out" section: Someone mailed in regarding Henry's fur and Henry responded: 9. Henry participated in an Indy Humane adoption at the Governor's residence! 10\. Henry met another one of Indiana's celebrity canines:Butler's mascot — Butler Blue Flash Survey Q: What's your favorite Henry Holcomb moment? body:

I’m putting my heart and soul into winning over as many Iowans as I can before February 3rd.

And when the days get long, and I get tired, I pick myself up to head to another event to answer more questions from voters because I know you’re giving this campaign everything you can, too.

I know this campaign has asked a lot from you, and I’m eternally grateful for everything -- but we need you one more time.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: This stuff really works!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
We’ve spent the last two weekends knocking on doors in Fort Bend county
trying to help Eliz Markowitz win a special election for the state house.
If she wins, she’ll be the first Democrat to represent the district in the
legislature.

But more than that, a victory on January 28th will show Texas and the
country that with only 8 more seats to pick up, we are going to win the
State House for the first time since 2001. And it will also mean that we
are poised to deliver our state’s 38 electoral college votes to the
Democratic nominee who will defeat Donald Trump.

That’s how important this election is. And that’s why Powered By People
has mobilized more than 950 people to block walk in House District 28 over
the last two weekends. They came from Katy and Houston, Austin and Dallas,
El Paso and Longview, Lubbock and San Antonio. Some even jumped on a plane
to come down from outside of Texas. And so far they’ve knocked on over
24,000 doors, initiating thousands of conversations with the voters who
will decide this important election.

And you know what? I think it’s working.

After one day of early voting, we are already breaking records for turnout
in a special election. By 7pm Tuesday, 3,579 people had voted at one of
the five early voting locations in Fort Bend. By way of comparison, during
the first day of early voting last November only 694 people had voted and
there were 23 early voting locations!

[1]Gov. Patrick Svitek's Very Good Tweet

That means that in an election where most pundits expected turnout to drop
off from November, turnout is actually FIVE TIMES what it was in November.

That’s the power of people.

Stronger than special interests or entrenched politicians, everyday Texans
are taking matters into their own hands. Direct voter engagement — person
to person conversations — eyeball to eyeball — more powerful than TV, or
Facebook ads, or any of that phony rock 'n roll.

It’s real people doing the really important work that wins elections.

But we’re not done yet. We still have another weekend of action, where we
hope to bring even more volunteers together to knock on doors for Eliz.
And we’ll have to really step up. Texas Governor Greg Abbott is chartering
buses to bring people from across Texas — with promises of free food and
hotels — to try to counter our efforts.

[2]Gov. Greg Abbott busing in supporters

So... no matter where you live, I really need you to help us out this
weekend in Fort Bend. Our ability to win this race — and ultimately the
State House — hangs in the balance. [ http://act.betoorourke.com/go/pbp-join-slack?t=1001&akid=77757%2E444211%2ED7plnK ]Please join our remote volunteer
call team to make calls between now and Election Day (January 28th) to
help get out the vote for Eliz.

And if you’d like to help fund this work, [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42142?refcode=ema20200122-77757-nat&t=1002&akid=77757%2E444211%2ED7plnK ]we’ll put your contributions
to use helping to raise, organize and mobilize the volunteers who will do
the hard work that wins elections.

Powered by People!

Beto

[5]Beto blockwalk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=77757%2E444211%2ED7plnK

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

body:

| | In an exclusive interview with Rachel Maddow, Lev Parnes broke his silence for the first time in the impeachment proceedings, saying, "President Trump knew exactly what was going on" in Ukraine. "He was aware of all my movements. I wouldn't do anything without the consent of Rudy Giuliani, or the president. I have no intent, I have no reason to speak to any of these officials," Parnes told Maddow. And John Bolton says he'll testify in the Senate trial if subpoenaed. But Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP have repeatedly blocked Democrats' attempts to call witnesses or subpoena new documents, halting many of their amendments on Tuesday when discussing the rules of the trial. subject: SHARE: It's time for real action to fix America's crumbling infrastructure.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
Trump promised action, but all we got were lies -- Mike's plan changes all that. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=cb39528190&e=f54746ec54)
---
| | | While our roads, bridges, and airports have crumbled, one infrastructure project has been getting plenty of money and support: _The border wall._ We've wasted billions of taxpayer dollars on a political stunt meant to divide us, when we could be investing in fixing the roads and bridges that connect us -- and in American workers who help us get there. That's exactly what Mike's new plan does. **Mike's plan will actually bring America's infrastructure into the 21st century and create millions of high-quality, high-paying jobs.** [**Share Mike's new infrastructure plan with your friends and family on Facebook right now.**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=bef818cb42&e=f54746ec54)
---
| [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=34a49c26e8&e=f54746ec54)
---
| [SHARE NOW >>](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=88c22c1b2c&e=f54746ec54 "SHARE NOW >>")
---
| Mike's community-driven plan will transform the way we build in America. It focuses on fixing the infrastructure we currently have, like filling potholes, updating our electrical grid, and converting to green energy. And Mike will give mayors and other local leaders the authority and resources to take on the most important projects -- and complete them, on-time and on-budget. President Trump pledged that he would invest billions in infrastructure -- but it was all talk and no action. Mike will deliver on this plan to build an infrastructure for the 21st century. [**If you support real action on infrastructure, share Mike's infrastructure plan with your friends and family on Facebook right now.**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=e8415c4a79&e=f54746ec54) Thanks, Team Bloomberg 2020

name: Steve Chabot
subject: There’s More Going on Than Impeachment
body:
Monumental success for the American people! No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-s/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [There's More Going on Than Impeachment](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-j/)
While most of the mainstream press has obsessed the past week about impeachment, President Trump just had two great victories that will greatly impact our economy. In this week's blog I discuss these developments and provide irrefutable evidence President Trump continues to achieve monumental results for the American people. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Is California Becoming the Homeless State?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-d/)
California was the state so many Americans aspired to move to. Now, many people are fleeing California and the state is rapidly becoming the "homeless state." Sadly homelessness is a nationwide problem, including back home in Cincinnati and Hamilton County. This week I discuss this epidemic and some possible solutions. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Was Trump Right to Take Out Soleimani?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-u/)
Virtually all the talking heads in the media, as well as congressional Democrats, have been critical of the President's decision to take out Iranian general Qassem Soleimani. However, I think it's important to look closely at the facts and not jump to conclusions. In this week's blog, I evaluate this ongoing situation unfolding in the Middle East. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [My Predictions for 2020](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-n/)
It's that time of year again. In this week's blog I'll make my best attempt to predict what's going to happen in the upcoming year! Reds, Bengals, and Politics? You won't want to miss today's post! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-p/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-x/)
### [Merry Christmas!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-m/)
In this week's blog I keep politics brief with a short update and share a Christmas greeting. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-c/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-q/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-a/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-f/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-z/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-v/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhztjuy-kujkulhluu-e/)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Another Schiff Show
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ

When the Supreme Court handed down their Citizens United decision ten years ago this week, they gave special interests unlimited power to influence our elections.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14203331/148636287/-1069540959?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGI3OTU4ZS1mNjNkLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F4p9r4S01DRNCVC6zS6XRjkPKMwx9VV9sPJadCoSU0s=&emci=a25f9eab-eb3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=14b7958e-f63d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=10203249)
Team,

When the Supreme Court handed down their _Citizens United_ decision ten years ago this week, they gave special interests unlimited power to influence our elections.

_**They might as well have put a “for sale” sign on Capitol Hill.**_

It’s time to restore the balance of power in our democracy by reforming our campaign finance system. Elected officials should work for their constituents, not special interest groups and wealthy donors.

[**Sign Eugene’s petition calling on Congress to end _Citizens United_ and fix our corrupt campaign finance system.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14203332/148636288/1281777014?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGI3OTU4ZS1mNjNkLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F4p9r4S01DRNCVC6zS6XRjkPKMwx9VV9sPJadCoSU0s=&emci=a25f9eab-eb3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=14b7958e-f63d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=10203249) | [End _Citizens United_ »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14203333/148636289/1281777014?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGI3OTU4ZS1mNjNkLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F4p9r4S01DRNCVC6zS6XRjkPKMwx9VV9sPJadCoSU0s=&emci=a25f9eab-eb3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=14b7958e-f63d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=10203249)
---
Since Eugene entered this race, dark money groups have unleashed millions of dollars into propping up people like Scott Perry in an effort to protect their own interests in Congress.**Just yesterday, we shared with you that a Koch-affiliated group is planning to use their billions of dollars to sway races across the country, including here in PA-10.**

[**This isn’t how our democracy should work, team. Sign Eugene’s petition to join us in telling Congress that our democracy is not for sale.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14203334/148636290/1281777014?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGI3OTU4ZS1mNjNkLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F4p9r4S01DRNCVC6zS6XRjkPKMwx9VV9sPJadCoSU0s=&emci=a25f9eab-eb3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=14b7958e-f63d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=10203249) [Sign now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14203335/148636291/1281777014?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGI3OTU4ZS1mNjNkLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F4p9r4S01DRNCVC6zS6XRjkPKMwx9VV9sPJadCoSU0s=&emci=a25f9eab-eb3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=14b7958e-f63d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=10203249)

name: Nancy Mace
subject: Quick Update!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR CONGRESS**
body:
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
[](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhvfly-uuffjdtr-i/)
| | | Dear Friend, These last several months have been a whirlwind -- and I couldn't be more grateful. Here is **an overview of our campaign's latest and greatest**. From outraising all my republican primary opponents in a BIG way to my first appearance on FOX NEWS to making our first campaign hires, I just want to say I could not do this without you. _**On The Fundraising Front...**_ This last quarter was truly one for the books. We raised more in Q4 than Q3 and so far we’ve raised $900k in the first 6 months of the campaign! Wow! Thanks to you, our campaign is growing its war chest to be able to build a strong operation for the primary in June. _**On The Media Front...**_ Last month I appeared on FOX NEWS, FOX Business AND FOX Radio all in the same day!
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
That last image is me showing Miles & Elli Grand Central station via Facetime before an early morning in-studio FOX News segment. 😁 _**On The Grassroots Front...**_ We've been working our way across every corner of the district. Our campaign is gaining momentum every single day, and I'm honored to get to visit with so many South Carolinians who have put their faith in our team. I am **taking nothing for granted** however. I was excited to see that just two weeks ago, our **Facebook page hit 40,000 LIKES**! Social media is an important tool to spread the campaign’s message and we really appreciate you following along as we put the work in to win this election. Thank you for all your LIKES, COMMENTS and SHARES!
---
---
_**The Mace Team**_ Lastly, I wanted to share that because you have given so generously early and often, at the start of January my Campaign Manager, Field Director and Field Staff were all hired. They are on the ground and working hard. I can’t wait for you to meet the team. Until then I will continue to build a strong organization to win not only the primary in June but also the General Election in November. If you’d like to be involved in any way, _[please let us know here](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhvfly-uuffjdtr-d/)_! _**Campaign Office**_ ALSO - If you have any office equipment, tables, chairs, printer paper, pens, a laser printer, file folders, you name it, labels, we are always looking to stock up. If you have anything you’d like to donate to the campaign, please let us know. _**MANY THANKS!**_ In closing, thank you. Thank you for joining me in this quest to #FlipTheFirst and to bring the right leadership back to South Carolina's 1st Congressional District. I’m looking forward to meeting as many voters as possible, learning the issues important to you and getting right to work. I will fight tooth and nail for constituents in SC01 -- just as I have during my time in the South Carolina legislature. I'm honored to be in this race and am so grateful for your support. Sincerely,
|
---
Nancy
| |
---
| |
---
---
[](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhvfly-uuffjdtr-h/)
**[Website](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhvfly-uuffjdtr-k/) | [Facebook](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhvfly-uuffjdtr-u/) | [Twitter](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhvfly-uuffjdtr-o/) **| _[**Donate**](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhvfly-uuffjdtr-b/)_

Until then I will continue to build a strong organization to win not only the primary in June but also the General Election in November. If you’d like to be involved in any way, ! Campaign Office ALSO - If you have any office equipment, tables, chairs, printer paper, pens, a laser printer, file folders, you name it, labels, we are always looking to stock up. If you have anything you’d like to donate to the campaign, please let us know. MANY THANKS! In closing, thank you. Thank you for joining me in this quest to #FlipTheFirst and to bring the right leadership back to South Carolina's 1st Congressional District. I’m looking forward to meeting as many voters as possible, learning the issues important to you and getting right to work. I will fight tooth and nail for constituents in SC01 -- just as I have during my time in the South Carolina legislature. I'm honored to be in this race and am so grateful for your support. Sincerely, | Nancy | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR CONGRESS | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | |

name: Jason Carter
subject: I’m supporting Teresa for United States Senate — and you should too
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14206073/148659619/664205141?refcode=em012320-header&refcode2=7675f9f9-fe3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njc1ZjlmOS1mZTNkLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DuvKfIn_uzmwdT0iCsqZ7UCDH673eZQJQzi1hWry2OQ=) **** | | Friend,

Georgia’s next United States senator isn’t going to be taking an easy job.

Once renowned as the world’s greatest deliberative body, these days the Senate is more of a legislative graveyard in the hands of the majority party.

Our next senator will need hands-on experience dealing with dysfunctional systems and making them work for the people in order to address the urgent issues facing our country.

That’s what I’ve been looking for in a Senate candidate to lead our Georgia Democratic Party to November’s elections.

**Today, I am proud to announce that candidate is Teresa Tomlinson.**

Teresa is unafraid of bucking the conventional wisdom when our government isn’t serving people like it’s supposed to. She’s for ending the Senate filibuster so we can make meaningful reforms to gun safety, healthcare, immigration, and climate policy.

As the two-term Mayor of Columbus, Georgia, she led the city to be named one of the 25 Best Run Cities in America. Teresa’s initiatives as mayor led to environmental cleanups, criminal justice reform, fiscal health, and a future-forward approach to transportation and infrastructure.

**[Teresa has the vision, experience, and a whole lot of Georgia gumption to win this race and put the Senate to work for us. Join me in supporting her today with your most generous contribution, and let’s win this thing!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14206074/148659620/664205141?refcode=em012320&noskip=true&refcode2=7675f9f9-fe3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njc1ZjlmOS1mZTNkLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DuvKfIn_uzmwdT0iCsqZ7UCDH673eZQJQzi1hWry2OQ=)** | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

name: Dean Browning
subject: Impeachment Has Finally Moved To The Senate
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Nancy Pelosi and her pawn, Schifty Adam Schiff, have finally moved the impeachment process to the Senate despite having no evidence of wrongdoing by the President. I am happy that the process is moving forward as it will finally allow us to put this crazy Witch Hunt to an end! Once this charade is over, President Donald J. Trump can get back to working for the American people.
As one of the President's strongest supporters, it is my mission to help him win re-election in 2020 and to work with the President in bringing back true Conservative values to the Lehigh Valley.
But we cannot do this by ourselves. We rely on grassroots supporters like yourself to chip-in to the cause and help fight back against the Liberal Elite. Will you consider supporting myself and President Donald J. Trump as we fight to win in November 2020? A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will go a long way in beating the Liberal Elites come this fall!
---

| Rep. Susan Wild is on the wrong side of history for supporting this impeachment which has been designed to undo the 2016 election and rig the upcoming 2020 election. I believe the American people and the voters in Lehigh Valley will see right through Rep. Wild's impeachment sham. This is why it is paramount to defeat her in the upcoming 2020 election. We need a Representative who will side with hard-working Americans, not just the Liberal Elite, and one who will support President Donald J. Trump's agenda in Making America Great Again! If you support our President and support Conservative values, then I urge you to donate to my campaign today. A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will help me win this election and get Rep. Susan Wild out of office.

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: I’ve gotta ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
The polls show that our Republican primary for U.S. Senate is neck and neck, and I need your help NOW to defeat Jeff Sessions and his pals on March 3rd!
Peter, This is urgent... so I’m going to get right to the point. The polls show that our Republican primary for U.S. Senate is neck and neck, and **[I need your help NOW to defeat Jeff Sessions and his pals on March 3rd!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cdcab4c4062b6b29/66ac5dcb26d561d8c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** The last thing Alabama needs is a liberal or a weak-kneed Republican “representing” our great state for the next six years. That’s exactly why we’re launching an aggressive get-out-the-vote campaign across Alabama, to rally the conservative grassroots for the primary. **[So please, rush your emergency support today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cdcab4c4062b6b29/d36af95fe48db60dc3d6b838967d376c/33013)**... whether it’s $3, $30, or $300, EVERY contribution will help me defeat these swamp politicians! The establishment insiders have made their choice. They want somebody they can control. Well, that’s not me. I’m not running to work for them. **I’m running to fight for YOU**. [**If you’re with me, I need to hear from you**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cdcab4c4062b6b29/8e2bc237dbb79ffdc3d6b838967d376c/33013) Every $1 will help us reach more voters!

\- Coach P.S. I am providing you with the full link if you want to use it to contribute: **[https://secure.anedot.com/tommy-tuberville-for-senate/](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cdcab4c4062b6b29/c03e6bc06f3a7758c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cdcab4c4062b6b29/128581b062a896a6c3d6b838967d376c/33013) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cdcab4c4062b6b29/f090316b8770c5aac3d6b838967d376c/33013) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cdcab4c4062b6b29/3f7372fe1bf60903c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

name: Terry Neese
subject: Let's get this over with
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Neese for Congress
body:
| | | Friend, This week, the United States Senate is moving forward on an impeachment trial for President Trump. While politicians in Washington D.C. are busy arguing about rules for a trial that shouldn’t have ever happened, **the American people haven’t forgotten that they elected our leaders to get RESULTS.** We elected President Trump in 2016 to drain the swamp and take power back from the liberal elite. In response, the radical Left has schemed ever since to remove our duly elected president from office in order to preserve their political influence. I’m running for Congress to join President Trump’s fight, and to replace Kendra Horn with a leader who will represent Oklahoma’s values. **We need a representative who will stand up to Nancy Pelosi and not take part in a liberal witch hunt.** But in order to win, and take back the House this November, I’m going to need your help. [_**Can I count on you to chip in $25 or more tonight?**_](https://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-l-chikrg-thatdilud-y/) [](https://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-l-chikrg-thatdilud-j/) By donating today, you will help us send a message to the liberals in Congress that we’re united in standing against the Left’s endless lies about President Trump. Can I count on you to help us fight back? Terry Neese

name: Megan West
subject: A Church at Planned Parenthood?
body:
| | You’ll want to hear this story!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNulGoOM4Hu4QfMjJfnfqZ7i29G2Pr_2lUOnF-KDNP_RIk8EbSFvYUoze008DhFv2tAeEicBicXt17GnOiY6nJI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200123com01&n=1)
| Peter, Pastor Ken Peters was faithfully leading his small church in Washington’s northeast city of Spokane when a guest preacher’s Sunday sermon grabbed his heart and prompted an unexpected response. That providential moment led to the creation of “The Church at Planned Parenthood” (TCAPP), a monthly gathering of Christians from various churches to worship God, boldly preach the Gospel message, and to spend time in corporate prayer repenting for this nation and the church’s role in the abortion holocaust...all while standing together outside a Planned Parenthood clinic. I spoke with Pastor Ken to learn more about the story of TCAPP and to understand the spiritual implications that this unforeseen church plant is now having nationwide. This story is inspiring. You’ll be moved by the obedience of Pastor Ken and the images of this church in action. As long as there are churches like this, there is great hope for our nation. Read the article, [The Church at Planned Parenthood](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNulGoOM4Hu4QfMjJfnfqZ7i29G2Pr_2lUOnF-KDNP_RIk8EbSFvYUoze008DhFv2tAeEicBicXt17GnOiY6nJI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200123com01&n=2) and be encouraged. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNulGoOM4Hu4QfMjJfnfqZ7i29G2Pr_2lUOnF-KDNP_RIk8EbSFvYUoze008DhFv2tAeEicBicXt17GnOiY6nJI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200123com01&n=3) **Do Good. Go Vote.** Megan West
Media Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200123com01&n=4)
---

Please, if you’re able, contribute $10 today. | | | | | | | | | | , My favorite part of this campaign is talking to voters about issues that matter to them: housing, healthcare, the justice system, climate change, and more. Our campaign wants to give TX-25 residents more power to effect change on these issues. | " DONATE " | Something that I enjoy less is asking people for money. But money is absolutely crucial to getting our message to folks. We need resources to make damn sure people in this district learn about the movement we’re building. name: Bill Olson
subject: "A Champion for Puerto Rico"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gTplxdAYYl6OuRU&b=sSYlJFH.ty_NmrM6Gt255w

Hi Peter

Darren Soto is unbelievable.

This guy claims to be a "Champion of Puerto Rico".

He has leveled all sorts of scurrilous accusations at President Trump for supposedly "holding up relief aid".

Now, we come to find out that the corruption in PR was MUCH worse than anyone knew:

Puerto Rico Gov. Wanda Vázquez Garced fired the island's emergency manager, hours after a warehouse filled with supplies was discovered.

The emergency aid is believed to be from when Hurricane Maria hit the island two years ago, the governor said.

Carlos Acevedo, director of Puerto Rico's Office of Emergency Management, was dismissed Saturday. The governor appointed Maj. Gen. José J. Reyes, the adjutant general of the Puerto Rico National Guard, to replace him.

Earlier on Saturday, numerous pallets of water and other boxes with emergency supplies were found at a warehouse in the earthquake ravaged city of Ponce.

This is why we are going to win!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gTplxdAYYl6OuRU&b=sSYlJFH.ty_NmrM6Gt255w
Trump is right. He has told us the truth the whole time.

To heck with Darren Soto, and his race baiting, and his lies. Believe your eyes.

2020 is going to be an epic year for Trump and the Republicans. Can you help me win in Florida's 9th?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gTplxdAYYl6OuRU&b=sSYlJFH.ty_NmrM6Gt255w

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gTplxdAYYl6OuRU&b=sSYlJFH.ty_NmrM6Gt255w
of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

I need your help to oust the treasonous Dems from Congress. The numbers are there for us to win! Let's send "woke" Nancy Pelosi home in defeat!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gTplxdAYYl6OuRU&b=sSYlJFH.ty_NmrM6Gt255w

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gTplxdAYYl6OuRU&b=sSYlJFH.ty_NmrM6Gt255w

P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gTplxdAYYl6OuRU&b=sSYlJFH.ty_NmrM6Gt255w
No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill.

name: Cory Booker
subject: Roe v. Wade is the law of the land
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | Reproductive rights are under attack in this country. Team, there is an all-out attack on reproductive rights in our country. In the past three years, Donald Trump has appointed far-right justices like Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court -- endangering access to a safe abortion for generations to come. And now, a major abortion rights case has come before the Court -- a case that could potentially overturn Roe v. Wade. That means it's up to Congress to do everything in its power to aggressively defend the right to choose. **[I hope you'll add your name right now and join me in demanding that Congress stand up for reproductive freedom.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fcd/5fca0d19/7aab26b4/291d3911/3317592304/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SaveReproductiveFreedoms/?code=booker&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcorybooker-2020-reproductive-freedom-petition%3Frefcode%3Dem_pet_20200123_CB_20200123-pet-CB-em1-actives_actives")** **Men who will never have to make reproductive health decisions in their own lives shouldn 't be making decisions about someone else's body and access to health care.** I spoke about this issue often during my campaign for president, advocating for the creation of a White House Office of Reproductive Freedom to coordinate and advance abortion rights and expand access to reproductive health care. **[A major reason I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate is to continue fighting for reproductive justice. If you share my belief that all people deserve to control their own bodies, please add your name here.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fcd/5fca0d19/7aab26b4/291d3911/3317592304/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SaveReproductiveFreedoms/?code=booker&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcorybooker-2020-reproductive-freedom-petition%3Frefcode%3Dem_pet_20200123_CB_20200123-pet-CB-em1-actives_actives")** Roe v. Wade is the law of the land -- and it needs to stay that way. I'm always going to be there to fight back against any effort to roll back abortion access. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fcd/5fca0d19/7aab26b4/291d3911/3317592304/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SaveReproductiveFreedoms/?code=booker&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcorybooker-2020-reproductive-freedom-petition%3Frefcode%3Dem_pet_20200123_CB_20200123-pet-CB-em1-actives_actives")

---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fcd/5fca0d19/7aab26b4/291d3910/3317592304/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fcd/5fca0d19/7aab26b4/291d391f/3317592304/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fcd/5fca0d19/7aab26b4/291d391e/3317592304/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fcd/5fca0d19/7aab26b4/291d391d/3317592304/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/unsubscribe").

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Newt Gingrich: Trump Triumphs at World Economic Forum While Democrats Pursue Baseless Impeachment
body:
"President Trump’s visit to the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland this week was a bigger triumph than anyone could possibly have imagined." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fc33d63146&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Newt Gingrich: Trump Triumphs at World Economic Forum While Democrats Pursue Baseless Impeachment**
“President Trump’s visit to the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland this week was a bigger triumph than anyone could possibly have imagined a year ago,” former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich writes for Fox News. “The counter-staging of President Trump landing at Davos while the Senate began the trial over his phony impeachment was a Reagan-quality move . . . once again President Trump gave an important, principled speech that was worthy of the leader of the biggest economy and most powerful military in the world.” [Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2a86c7034a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “‘I'm concerned that if we don't impeach this president, he will get reelected.’ Rarely do politicians show their hand with such an obvious statement. But, in early May of last year, that’s exactly what Rep. Al Green, D-Texas, did. More than anything, those 13 words offer a clear vision of the Democratic Party’s goal over the past three years,” Sen. Tim Scott (R-SC) writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7cd96f99eb&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “When Mrs. Pelosi, Mr. Schiff and the other House impeachment managers invoke the Founding Fathers, these are crocodile tears for the existing constitutional order. The progressive punch list the past three years stands: Abolish the Electoral College, pack the Supreme Court, remove a presidential impediment from office. That’s _their_ democracy,” Daniel Henninger writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a202f66621&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Any American hit with a baseless subpoena has the right to challenge it in court. “But Schiff and his colleagues not only chose not to permit the judicial process to play out with respect to those subpoenas; they chose to call the president’s attempt to avail himself of his rights ‘obstruction of Congress’ and an impeachable offense itself. How Orwellian,” Henry Olsen writes in [_The Washington Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3142c4ea47&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “My daughter, Porter, suffers from cystic fibrosis, a genetic disorder that shortens lives and requires expensive care. According to a Kaiser Permanente report, 87% of babies diagnosed with cystic fibrosis before birth are tragically aborted. These children are robbed of their lives and their parents miss out on the daily joy of loving their children, as we gratefully experience every day with Porter,” Acting White House Budget Director Russ Vought writes for _[The Daily Wire](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87f61bf2aa&e=3ee4985eea)._

**NEW:**[“Trump to become first president in history to speak at March for Life”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b3b5acd7f5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f5c1da205c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5124ca26bb&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=1e7f87a715)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
---
| | | **Team Ben Ray Luj an is sharing our official strategy memo with you.** _[**Please take a minute to read this full note, then rush $10 to help Ben Ray WIN his Senate race and DEFEAT McConnell 's Senate! >>**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200123_em_fr_b1_osmteam_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")_ | ******[**CHIP IN $10 NOW >>**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200123_em_fr_b1_osmteam_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******
---

[](secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200123_em_fr_b1_osmteam_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180)
---

Our team wanted to start this historic election year by sharing our strategy to win New Mexico's Senate race and FLIP McConnell's Senate.

**We know this is a long email. But we 're counting on you to read the entire thing -- then rush a gift to help Ben Ray defeat McConnell's Senate.**

******[**CHIP IN $10 NOW >>**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200123_em_fr_b1_osmteam_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******
---

**Here 's where things stand with our fight for the Senate: **

**1\. POLLING:** Keeping New Mexico's Senate seat blue is critical to our efforts to WIN the Senate majority and send Mitch McConnell packing. **The good news first:** Recent polling shows Ben Ray ahead of a Republican opponent. This is _exactly_ the kind of early momentum a winning campaign needs. **The not-so-good news:** Many of the key voters in our race remain undecided. Our campaign is executing an aggressive strategy to speak directly to as many voters as possible over the coming months. We're confident that when voters hear Ben Ray's vision for our communities, they'll join our team. [_**But re**_ _**aching these voters will take significant resources. Can you chip in to make sure that Ben Ray is able to meet as many New Mexicans as possible ahead of this election? We are counting on your $10 to win this thing. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200123_em_fr_b1_osmteam_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")
---

**2\. MONEY:** Mitch McConnell's Republicans have a massive -- MASSIVE -- war chest ready to buy him another Republican Senate. They're going to rely on dark money and special interests to fund their campaigns. Ben Ray is relying on you. We're not taking a dime of corporate PAC money during this race. This means we need a grassroots army to power Ben Ray to victory. So far, we've been humbled by the number of hard-working voters who are joining this team. Here are some important stats: **Average online donation size:** $20.29 **Small-dollar:** 98.25% of the contributions were $100 or less **That 's what grassroots power looks like** \-- but we can't slow down now. [_**We don 't have to match Republicans dollar-for-dollar, but we do need to make sure Ben Ray has the resources to compete against their dark money-filled war chest. He can't defend this critical Senate seat without your $10. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200123_em_fr_b1_osmteam_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")
---

**3\. THE ISSUES:** Ben Ray is running because he wants to fix the kitchen-table issues that keep American families up at night. He has a plan to address our broken health care system, protect our planet, support New Mexico's children and families, and make opportunities available for all. **And his opponents?** Here's what matters to them:
* Anti-choice extremism
* Keeping weapons of war on the streets
* Huge tax breaks for the 1% and big corporations

[_**Mitch McConnell is DESPERATE to have any of Ben Ray 's extreme opponents in the Senate. Pitch in $10 to make sure his favorite candidates are defeated. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200123_em_fr_b1_osmteam_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")
---

And here's the final thing you should know. **Ben Ray has earned endorsements from dozens of state and national leaders, including End Citizens United, the Brady Campaign to Prevent Gun Violence, Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice American, and the Sierra Club.**

name: Carter @ Shedd for Congress
subject: did you get my impeachment email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends,
_I really need to hear from you._

| Team,

Michael just sat down with Jake Tapper and Wolf Blitzer to talk impeachment.

He had a lot to say: ["[We have] a president who has stonewalled not just the Senate, but every journalist in America, every voter in America.... If we allow this kind of conduct to go forward and we allow the president to stiff arm America the way he is in this context...there will be nothing left of our checks and balances."](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab5a/134673f2/84741a9/699747e0/2908267124/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfacnn?refcode=EM_FR_B1_012320_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Team Scholten
subject: 🤦‍♂️ Did you see what Steve King is up to?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

Iowa’s 4th District is made up of over 750,000 people across our 39 counties. That means 750,000 people in our district rely on Steve King to be their voice in Congress.

Instead of representing every voice in our district, he’s running fundraising ads asking for help to make sure “the lefties stay triggered.”

**[That’s enough, Steve. It’s time for someone who will actually represent Iowa’s 4th, not just make memes.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14216461/148756075/-52674191?refcode=em20_200123_stevekingrr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Y1MGZlNy0yNjNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VH463bK1GvEjfn6IdGyYHVmDMm2UhE9ZtUr80xno4UM=)** [DONATE TO J.D.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14216462/148756076/-52674191?refcode=em20_200123_stevekingrr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Y1MGZlNy0yNjNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VH463bK1GvEjfn6IdGyYHVmDMm2UhE9ZtUr80xno4UM=) Our district has farmers struggling because of the trade war and the outsized influence of corporations.

Our district has folks living in towns that have lost their grocery stores, and are now facing a severe shortage of affordable, healthy food.

Our district has working families dealing with four decades of wage stagnation, while their medical costs continue to skyrocket.

Steve King doesn’t spend his time standing up for these folks. He fundraises off of far-right memes online and spends more time pushing conspiracy theories than working for the 750,000 constituents who rely on him in Washington.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14216463/148756077/-52674191?refcode=em20_200123_stevekingrr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Y1MGZlNy0yNjNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VH463bK1GvEjfn6IdGyYHVmDMm2UhE9ZtUr80xno4UM=)
---

clean_body: Peter, Iowa’s 4th District is made up of over 750,000 people across our 39 counties. That means 750,000 people in our district rely on Steve King to be their voice in Congress. Instead of representing every voice in our district, he’s running fundraising ads asking for help to make sure “the lefties stay triggered.” = = Our district has farmers struggling because of the trade war and the outsized influence of corporations. Our district has folks living in towns that have lost their grocery stores, and are now facing a severe shortage of affordable, healthy food. Our district has working families dealing with four decades of wage stagnation, while their medical costs continue to skyrocket. Steve King doesn’t spend his time standing up for these folks. He fundraises off of far-right memes online and spends more time pushing conspiracy theories than working for the 750,000 constituents who rely on him in Washington. | = = = Thank you, Team Scholten =

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Pick Your Breakout Session: Congress of Counties
body:
It's nearly here: Congress of Counties, our two-day campaign training and networking conference,is next weekend in downtown Indianapolis!... |
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eb7839689b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Congress of Counties:**
**_Pick Your Breakout Sessions
(& We've Got Some Good Ones)_**
---
| Hoosier Republican,

It's nearly here: [Congress of Counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=abdea9b1c9&e=1acd9bb3d6), our two-day campaign training and networking conference, is _**next weekend**_ in downtown Indianapolis!
[**\-- > REGISTER NOW <\--**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=515db77905&e=1acd9bb3d6)
We've got a [TON of breakout sessions](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9ead273c4e&e=1acd9bb3d6) you can participate in at Congress of Counties, and they'll cover info you'll need to know in 2020 and beyond. Here's just a few of the topics:
* **_Preparing for Election Day_**
What's legally required to run an election? We'll get into the details of election boards, poll workers, and how to watch for voter fraud. If you're involved with election administration, this is an in-depth session that you don't want to miss.

* _**Campaign Fundraising**_
Does your campaign plan to spend money? Then you better know how to raise it! Learn about strategies and tactics when it comes to campaign fundraising.

* _**Diversity: The Art of Thinking Independently Together**_
We all have attributes and backgrounds we bring to the table that make us different -- and bring us together. Learn how diversity strengths our party and our government!

* _**Understanding Social Media: Facebook, Twitter, Instagram & More**_
Confused about where to start with social media? Don't know how to best share your message with voters online? We've got the training you'll need!

* **_Data Center: The Basics & How to Create Walkbooks & 50%+_**
You've heard about GOP Data Center...but where do you start when it comes to building the audience of voters you'll need to win? We can explain and show you how.

* _**Campaign Finance**_
You've scheduled your first campaign fundraiser...but what donations are you allowed to accept? How do you track donations? And how does reporting work? We've got the important answers that will keep your campaign legal!

* _**Building Blocks of a Successful Campaign**_
You've filed for office...but now what? We'll explain how to build your campaign, set your goals and work toward victory.

* _**2020 Statewide Election Outlook**_
What are the big issues we're anticipating you'll see discussed in 2020? We've got a preview for you.

These are just a few of the breakout sessions topics...[check them all out here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3a62a7e7c8&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Haven't registered yet? [Register now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=331c7e31cc&e=1acd9bb3d6) before it's too late (tickets are going quickly).

See you soon,
-Your Indiana Republican Party
---

---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=01a1cb2e27&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Alice Lin Tong, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: Laura, Odell, Edward, Karen, and Rodney
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | Derek,

Before the holidays, our campaign manager Bruce reached out asking you to help check some things off Mark's wishlist. And people from every corner of Virginia stepped up.

**[Can you give $5 to help us pay for pens and clipboards for our volunteers? Anything you can give would be crucial for our campaign efforts to reelect Mark and other Virginia Democrats in 2020.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d699/53d9897e/534ff64c/1c89a103/2719856781/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-senpercent?refcode=20200122_f_1_nd_nb__436__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Here are just a handful of our recent donors who helped with their generous contributions:
* Laura J. from Fredericksburg gave **$5** , which will help us buy pens and clipboards for our unstoppable volunteers
* Odell L. from Newport News donated **$10** , and we'll use his donation to purchase campaign literature for field staff and volunteers
* Edward P. from Lynchburg contributed **$35** , which will feed volunteers in between their canvassing shifts
* Karen T. from Arlington gave **$100** , and we plan on using that money to pay one of our campaign office's phone bills (we make a lot of calls!)
* Rodney S. from Oakton donated **$500** , which will help us pay for a TV ad to spread Mark's message across the Commonwealth

Mark is proud to be a senator for all of Virginia -- from Fredericksburg to Newport News. That's why he's so proud that his supporter network spans every corner of the Commonwealth.

**Will you show your support and match Laura's gift and donate $5 today to help keep Mark in the Senate?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: These White House documents could have been crucial to getting the facts in this impeachment trial.
body:
Last night...

Friend -
In the middle of the night on Tuesday, Senator Collins voted against a subpoena of key White House documents which impeachment managers called "directly relevant" to the "President's scheme to strong arm Ukraine" to interfere in the 2020 election.
She's trying to hide the facts - and we've had enough. Chip in at this link if you have too:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/Impeachment](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ec1/4bef7a87/6aba9537/287f8be5/2236129818/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200123-1-full")**
_\----Original message----_
**BREAKING: President Trump admits White House is withholding evidence**
Friends -
President Trump just said he is comfortable with the impeachment trial because the White House is withholding evidence:
_" Honestly, we have all the material. They don't have the material."
\- President Trump, 1/22 _
**Mitch McConnell has coordinated with the Trump Administration every step of the way. And last night Susan Collins voted with Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans to block a subpoena of White House documents.**
[**Fight back with a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign to defeat Susan Collins and take back the Senate for Democrats. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ec1/4bef7a87/6aba9537/287f8be5/2236129818/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200123-1-full")
**********[CHIP IN->](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ec1/4bef7a87/6aba9537/287f8be5/2236129818/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200123-1-full")**********
Trump and McConnell can only get away with this because of support from Senate Republicans including Susan Collins. Help us elect a Senator who will do what is right and put truth and fairness before partisanship and party loyalty.
\- Team Sara

Sara Gideon for Maine

name: Amy Bolick
subject: we need some commonsense
disclaimer_text: paid for by DC insider groups

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14217330/148765126/1525607060?refcode=Em_fr_2020.01.23_b1_AB_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzMwYTczOS0yYzNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3xRGCZM0ChZOUkfgKpOsaLgGQqjcaGfk2Fr_5D9O5hM=)
---
| Peter,

Corruption. Gun violence. Corruption. Skyrocketing healthcare costs. Corruption. Climate change. Did I mention corruption?

Our country has faced a lot of issues that we need to tackle together. To solve these problems, we need leadership that cares about our community, not someone who is being bought and paid for by DC insider groups.

**_We also need someone with some good, old fashioned common sense._ **Unfortunately, Ross Spano doesn't seem to have a lot of that.

After the Parkland shooting in Florida, he was **more concerned with declaring pornography a public health risk than ending the gun violence epidemic**. In Congress, he voted **against protecting people with pre-existing conditions** , even though more than 7 million Floridians have them. And, in spite of living in a state where we see super storms, rising sea levels, and toxic algae blooms, he **denies the existence of climate change**.

To top it all off, he's currently the **only sitting member of Congress under criminal investigation** because he accepted nearly $200,000 in illegal funds to win his last election.

**Peter, we need to elect someone who has just as much common sense as we do.** Not someone who cares more about making wealthy donors happy than he does about tackling the real problems our district faces.

When I'm in Congress, I'll fight for affordable healthcare, gun safety, renewable energy, and other common sense solutions. And you'll never see a headline that I'm under FBI investigation.

[**Can I count on you, Peter, to chip in to our common sense fund today? clean_body: = | Peter, Corruption. Gun violence. Corruption. Skyrocketing healthcare costs. Corruption. Climate change. Did I mention corruption? Our country has faced a lot of issues that we need to tackle together. To solve these problems, we need leadership that cares about our community, not someone who is being bought and paid for by DC insider groups. We also need someone with some good, old fashioned common sense. Unfortunately, Ross Spano doesn't seem to have a lot of that. After the Parkland shooting in Florida, he was more concerned with declaring pornography a public health risk than ending the gun violence epidemic. In Congress, he voted against protecting people with pre-existing conditions , even though more than 7 million Floridians have them. And, in spite of living in a state where we see super storms, rising sea levels, and toxic algae blooms, he denies the existence of climate change. To top it all off, he's currently the only sitting member of Congress under criminal investigation because he accepted nearly $200,000 in illegal funds to win his last election. Peter, we need to elect someone who has just as much common sense as we do. Not someone who cares more about making wealthy donors happy than he does about tackling the real problems our district faces. When I'm in Congress, I'll fight for affordable healthcare, gun safety, renewable energy, and other common sense solutions. And you'll never see a headline that I'm under FBI investigation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= = = = = Let’s put some commonsense back into FL-15. Friend, The next few weeks are critical. We are knocking on doors, and talking to voters. Our campaign is based on the issues that are important to our district. Monika is working to give our children a world class education, healthcare that is affordable and that covers everyone. She is working to reform our criminal justice system and combat climate change. We need to keep letting voters know about Monika and we need your help. We have to keep payroll, pay for our field program, run ads, and pay the rent. **[Will you chip in $25, or whatever you can, to help us put Monika in Congress?
