name: Greg Pence
subject: I just made a big decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
Today, I filed paperwork declaring my candidacy to serve another term as Congressman for Indiana's Sixth Congressional District. [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=c50bfa44840d4990a77b392c5e4a2926&_e=0NCLMHqQqOMCAmRfw_NBxQlA35uerqdDu9PpoDlR64Txwu2U-BcsulywnbVH8Ge_Zvl3qW8a3w5ZFkbthSy5B4T6jr84dOtG5QAcgLAEJsxfXNjF53lTFQBHAMm7maE1HnEXcfXZzilztVbBmL5CAnJNZ-KnBpbZA-6gD_VUUeGl_u9Cb2SUO9dkhXPPPqzpYuOGD6YuwF3vE8j7EneW13L_Bv1tCI4ZWSurvZO2BKBPK9CLodghTBnxJk6gVmALLA33QTevH52UMlDLfeR_JNhwfz-oWz4mIl4sx5DZYB7EiBb9UA08imqqb_5T8uFXChGwAp-apHRTbud9UmoZd50U0lkRYheOjgcZo9YZPS0MCAn46-v95pVBxUfrFIekWsJ5IQU8VTtrE5A2vPmGmJhxtnlfPbi4boSJXIMse3I%3D) Friend, Today, I filed paperwork declaring my candidacy to serve another term as Congressman for Indiana's Sixth Congressional District.
_With your support in 2018, I ran a campaign based on our shared Hoosier values and an unwavering commitment to stand alongside President Trump to protect American farmers and manufacturers; to grow our economy and create jobs and opportunity for every Hoosier right here in the Sixth District. _
**Despite the do-nothing Democrat majority in the United States House of Representatives, I am proud of all President Trump and Republicans have accomplished. **
In this last year, I helped champion important legislation and fought for the President’s agenda, including:
* Passing the United States-Mexico-Canada Trade Agreement. The USMCA will add 176,000 jobs and generate $68 billion of new economic activity for American workers, manufacturers, and farmers.

* Permanently repealing the Medical Device Tax, which will lower healthcare costs, increase access to live-saving care, and bring stability to an industry that employs more than 20,000 Hoosiers.

* Increasing access to internet and broadband services in rural communities.

* Ensuring Gold Star Families receive a small amount of justice for the 1983 terrorist attack on the Marine Barracks in Beirut, Lebanon that claimed the lives of 241 of my fellow servicemen.

While ensuring that you have a seat at the table in Washington, D.C., my highest priority will always be the Hoosiers of Indiana's Sixth District.
In the last year we have helped nearly 400 Hoosiers with casework, met with thousands of constituents, and responded to more than 28,000 emails, letters and phone calls. I am especially proud of the fact that we visited 111 communities in our district during my first year in office.
_I am proud to serve the community that I have always called home. In fact, I still live in Columbus, Indiana in the very house that Denise and I raised our kids. I will never become part of the Washington Swamp. _
**But our work isn't nearly done. **
With your support, we will elect President Trump for another term. And, we'll continue to send Hoosier values to our Nation's capital.
Together, we will tackle critical issues, like:
* Building vital infrastructure across America.

* Fighting the opioid crisis.

* Ensuring that the booming Trump economy brings unprecedented prosperity to every community.

* Securing our borders and stopping the flow of illegal drugs that poison our communities.

* Making sure our veterans get the care they have earned and providing our Armed Forces with every resource to provide for our national defense.

And we'll continue to show the American people that the can-do Republican Party is the answer to Nancy Pelosi and the do-nothing Democrats.
I would be honored to have your continued support in 2020. I proudly served as a United States Marine, and I am honored to be your Congressman. If I’m going to continue to bring Hoosier values to Washington and support the President, I’ll need your help over the next year.
Will you add your name and pledge to spend some time over the next year volunteering for my campaign? If so, follow this safe and secure link: **[https://secure.winred.com/gregpence/volunteer-69683/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=c50bfa44840d4990a77b392c5e4a2926&_e=0NCLMHqQqOMCAmRfw_NBxQlA35uerqdDu9PpoDlR64Txwu2U-BcsulywnbVH8Ge_Zvl3qW8a3w5ZFkbthSy5B4T6jr84dOtG5QAcgLAEJsxfXNjF53lTFQBHAMm7maE1HnEXcfXZzilztVbBmL5CAnJNZ-KnBpbZA-6gD_VUUeGl_u9Cb2SUO9dkhXPPPqzpYuOGD6YuwF3vE8j7EneW1yyyzPjtgjfFwhGEm62ZogAytXjzTK6IlPOJuK9Qf1vQgR26SKTdghwlb4l8g3wdblsYqhOHo4TpI121B2dYW8dQFI7eVBL5JIfdnopU3xM7Qk339IvbVMGdo3cQ8hV3T5C8gBLqvZKKnSTtSC325Xa6jHjR-SJKogfru05E8u89G7VMJi7tCRaq5p5mvXfYefUkJdHXhBIXacIKm_VVJAM%3D)**
Thank you for the prayers and generosity you have shown my family. With your continued support, I am READY TO SERVE AGAIN.
Sincerely, Greg Pence | |
---

| PO Box 275 Taylorsville, IN 47280 |

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- I have an important question to ask you as we near the end of January and approach another critical deadline coming up next week. I hope you'll grant me a moment to explain why this is so important. I didn't take the usual path to public office. I worked as a geologist then became a brewer and small business owner whose successful brewpub helped revitalize a neglected warehouse district in Denver. Then, I ran for mayor and eventually governor, creating jobs here in Colorado and getting things done that mattered for people by bringing folks together around our common values. It wasn't easy then, and I know it won't be easy now -- not with the bickering and partisanship in Washington, some of which is on display this week. But I know we can do it again if we win this election the right way. **My opponent is considered the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country, but he 's also backed by Mitch McConnell's network of right-wing billionaire donors who are going to do everything they can to tear us down. We can't let them get away with it.** So, as we approach our first monthly fundraising deadline of the year, we're looking to raise $500,000 from as many grassroots donors as possible in the next week. **Will you make a donation of $10 or more toward our January fundraising deadline today? The amount you donate honestly isn 't as important as the act of donating, which is a declaration of your support for the kind of campaign we're running.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200123-lme?refcode=em-200123-c&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Helping Beto out on an important thing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
We’ve spent
the last two weekends knocking on tens of thousands of doors to get out
the vote for Eliz Markowitz in a key special election runoff.

Now early voting has started. We’re seeing turnout at FIVE TIMES the rate
of early voting in November. Our field strategy is working wonders. In
just a few short days, we can pull off a huge upset by electing Eliz and
bringing Texas within striking distance of Democratic control.

Why does this one election matter so much? Texas is the largest
battleground state in the country. A win for Eliz puts us within an 8-seat
margin of flipping the state’s legislature from red to blue. It puts six
House seats in Democratic contention. It’s a special election with
national implications.

We can win, but we need more volunteer hours. Beto is assembling a remote
volunteer call team to dial voters on our target list over the next 6
days.

[ http://act.betoorourke.com/go/pbp-join-slack?t=1001&akid=77818%2E444211%2E91XzBB ]Can you click here to join the team now and make some calls to get the
job done? Please sign up for our Slack channel so we can keep you in the
loop on how to get started.

Join the team >>

Signing up for our Slack channel will get you in touch with our volunteer
coordinators who can explain just how easy it is to get started making
calls to voters for Eliz.

Even if you don’t live in Texas, this is critically important work.
Remember, winning Texas in 2020 means we beat Trump handily in the
electoral college. Winning the Texas legislature means we can expand
Medicaid under Obamacare. It all starts with getting Eliz elected.

[ http://act.betoorourke.com/go/pbp-join-slack?t=1002&akid=77818%2E444211%2E91XzBB ]So please: sign up for our remote call team Slack channel now and let’s
get to work winning this extremely close race.

Thank you for all you do,

Powered By People team

PS: If you can’t join our remote call team, Beto has asked if you can
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42144?refcode=ema20200123-77818&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=77818%2E444211%2E91XzBB ]please chip in $3 to help us fund the software and team
necessary to call voters and knock doors in this extremely important
special election. Every dollar helps.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42144?refcode=ema20200123-77818&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=77818%2E444211%2E91XzBB ]Contribute $3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=77818%2E444211%2E91XzBB

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

subject: Yesterday's announcement >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
The Democratic National Committee announced yesterday that Arizona would be atop their list of _Battleground Build-Up States in 2020._

**Democrats _CAN _win in Arizona, but only if we invest time and resources into turning out Latinos, young people, and working families in Maricopa County, so I am ecstatic to hear that national Democrats agree with me on this! **

**[CHIP IN to support my efforts to turn out Democratic voters in Maricopa County in November>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/Qlple3h5ecPxPszEF_geY5APewMOMLXC-txLKO-HKHg=/kzNAiCOCIkBZ6WXXEWK4prBn4vKLvC7vk_7x9hsC_RE=?refcode=X_012220_TOTVFund_M&amount=25&recurring=auto)**

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Trying to Impeach Trump for Russian Collusion??
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016q6rwy-kyTzlxumcXpg-kt8ipgl1XJURcFRWih4A3DcEgrtfwdtAGtGvzeOvGFgBDDNQRWs1VQU0FdBb1xK0JJZv_Bo5qOy_tvoXvX5pkrJMWwWSRNK8aVdwJDxM_6Sb9776n010Ibe4SNIcbV8VKH7-jAS_a09DWYsBTf6VqMY=&c=TzY5S6FMTG3AtJBO_gJyjqOD9wOzRtRc9Na61-s45XJeJh6L58MkKA==&ch=rAXK5WApX1L3_t017QC9KQHlUnSeAxTpQZfoPaaf7TjQwwhbRow__w==)
---
| Patriot,
The Left has officially lost their minds. For two years they cried "Russian collusion" but were debunked by their own so-called savior, Robert Mueller.
Yet Democrats are still blaming [collusion](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016q6rwy-kyTzlxumcXpg-kt8ipgl1XJURcFRWih4A3DcEgrtfwdtAGtGvzeOvGFgBDDNQRWs1VQU0FdBb1xK0JJZv_Bo5qOy_tvoXvX5pkrJMWwWSRNK8aVdwJDxM_6Sb9776n010Ibe4SNIcbV8VKH7-jAS_a09DWYsBTf6VqMY=&c=TzY5S6FMTG3AtJBO_gJyjqOD9wOzRtRc9Na61-s45XJeJh6L58MkKA==&ch=rAXK5WApX1L3_t017QC9KQHlUnSeAxTpQZfoPaaf7TjQwwhbRow__w==) between the Trump Campaign and Russia for their historic loss in the 2016 election, and trying to use it as a reason to impeach President Trump.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016q6rwy-kyTzlxumcXpg-kt8ipgl1XJURcFRWih4A3DcEgrtfwdtAGtGvzeOvGFgBDDNQRWs1VQU0FdBb1xK0JJZv_Bo5qOy_tvoXvX5pkrJMWwWSRNK8aVdwJDxM_6Sb9776n010Ibe4SNIcbV8VKH7-jAS_a09DWYsBTf6VqMY=&c=TzY5S6FMTG3AtJBO_gJyjqOD9wOzRtRc9Na61-s45XJeJh6L58MkKA==&ch=rAXK5WApX1L3_t017QC9KQHlUnSeAxTpQZfoPaaf7TjQwwhbRow__w==)
---
| Adam Schiff and House Democrats continue their lies to the American people to try to remove the president from office. The American people know better, and we "deplorables" are fighting back against the lies.
---
| | | [EXPOSE THE LIES OF THE LEFT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016q6rwy-kyTzlxumcXpg-kt8ipgl1XJURcFRWih4A3DcEgrtfwdtAGtGvzeOvGFgBDDNQRWs1VQU0FdBb1xK0JJZv_Bo5qOy_tvoXvX5pkrJMWwWSRNK8aVdwJDxM_6Sb9776n010Ibe4SNIcbV8VKH7-jAS_a09DWYsBTf6VqMY=&c=TzY5S6FMTG3AtJBO_gJyjqOD9wOzRtRc9Na61-s45XJeJh6L58MkKA==&ch=rAXK5WApX1L3_t017QC9KQHlUnSeAxTpQZfoPaaf7TjQwwhbRow__w==)
---
| If you're tired of the constant lies against the President and his supporters, I want you on my team. The Silent Majority must be silent no more! Chip in now to help me defend President Trump from the lies of the Left and KEEP AMERICA GREAT in 2020.
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW AND DEFEND THE PRESIDENT FROM IMPEACHMENT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016q6rwy-kyTzlxumcXpg-kt8ipgl1XJURcFRWih4A3DcEgrtfwdtAGtGvzeOvGFgBDDNQRWs1VQU0FdBb1xK0JJZv_Bo5qOy_tvoXvX5pkrJMWwWSRNK8aVdwJDxM_6Sb9776n010Ibe4SNIcbV8VKH7-jAS_a09DWYsBTf6VqMY=&c=TzY5S6FMTG3AtJBO_gJyjqOD9wOzRtRc9Na61-s45XJeJh6L58MkKA==&ch=rAXK5WApX1L3_t017QC9KQHlUnSeAxTpQZfoPaaf7TjQwwhbRow__w==)

| Thanks for your support. I'll never back down from defending the President.
---
|

| Matt Gaetz

name: Texas Debate Alert (via Team MJ)
subject: you won't want to miss this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
On Saturday MJ will take the stage for one of the first major debates of the 2020 Senate race!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904f1/7f51f7bc/4abc459b/4ef07771/4075127013/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

---
Peter,

**On Saturday MJ will take the stage for one of the first major debates of the 2020 Senate race,** where she'll show why she's the best candidate to take on and DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn.

As a combat veteran and working mom who's faced many of the challenges Texas families deal with every day, we know MJ has what it takes to win this race. But with **only 24 days between Saturday 's debate and the start of early voting**, there are still a lot of undecided voters out there. We need to convince _them_ to support MJ too!

**[That's why we're announcing a Pre-Debate Goal of bringing in donations from 3,500 supporters -- like you! -- before MJ takes the stage on Saturday.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904f1/7f51f7bc/4abc459b/4ef07777/4075127013/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-debate-nd?refcode=email_20200123.2nd__802__&amount=10&recurring=true")

Will you make a donation right now to help us reach our goal? We want to tell MJ right before she hits the stage just how many of you chipped in to show your support! Your generous gift will go directly to helping MJ win the primary and DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Nancy Pelosi: A true American leader
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter: Source: [@SpeakerPelosi](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf85/6e9863e8/8116c8d/1db055c7/759331971/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://twitter.com/SpeakerPelosi/status/1217603802892840965") Speaker Nancy Pelosi is leading the charge against Republican obstruction and abuse of power, rallying Democrats together and fending off GOP attacks with grace and dignity. She held firm in holding on to the articles of impeachment until more evidence came forward, John Bolton offered testimony to the Senate, and Lev Parnas, Giuliani's close associate, handed over damning evidence further implicating the president. But she can't be the only one. Engaged Democrats across the country need to have her back as we head into the next election. We need to hear from you today: **Do you support Nancy Pelosi?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf85/6e9863e8/8116c8d/1db055c6/759331971/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/2yvU5Boo") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf85/6e9863e8/8116c8d/1db055c6/759331971/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/2yvU5Boo") Thank you, The WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf85/6e9863e8/8116c8d/1db055c6/759331971/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/2yvU5Boo")

name: Roe v. Wade Alert
subject: Take a stand before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:

We're worried, Team - more than 200 Republican lawmakers just asked the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade and deny women the right to choose a medically safe abortion.
This is Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch's first opportunity to destroy abortion rights in America. Roe v. Wade has never been more at risk.

name: Tim Walz for Governor
subject: BREAKING: Trump’s “highest-profile backer” considers challenge to Gov. Walz
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Hi, It's official. The far right-wing of the Minnesota Republican Party is already recruiting candidates to run against Governor Walz. According to the Star Tribune, the latest potential challenger is a self-funder with extreme views and an estimated net worth of $300 million. He is cited as "one of Trump's loudest boosters in Minnesota." [**STAR TRIBUNE:** "President Donald Trump's highest-profile backer in Minnesota"](https://act.myngp.com/el/UV_olh1E7W7lBi7Ikj_QBOAbXMJ706zEOk6VzHOgu8k=/vyKtqdvCKhcHJrdZkR5D4nPiPIY8M_UuIlDAZh-VSQ8=?refcode=body&amount=25)**[](https://act.myngp.com/el/UV_olh1E7W7lBi7Ikj_QBOAbXMJ706zEOk6VzHOgu8k=/vyKtqdvCKhcHJrdZkR5D4nPiPIY8M_UuIlDAZh-VSQ8=?refcode=body&amount=25)**[mulling challenge to Gov. Walz](https://act.myngp.com/el/UV_olh1E7W7lBi7Ikj_QBOAbXMJ706zEOk6VzHOgu8k=/vyKtqdvCKhcHJrdZkR5D4nPiPIY8M_UuIlDAZh-VSQ8=?refcode=body&amount=25) Hi, It's official. The far right-wing of the Minnesota Republican Party is already recruiting candidates to run against Governor Walz. According to the _Star Tribune_ , the latest potential challenger is a self-funder with extreme views and an estimated net worth of $300 million. name: Sara Gideon for U.S. Senate
subject: Susan Collins just said she "intend[s] to take the same approach" during the Senate impeachment trial as she did during the Kavanaugh nomination.
body:
She's sweeping facts under the rug.

Friends,
Susan Collins said she**"intend[s] to take the same approach"** during the Senate impeachment trial as she did during Kavanaugh's confirmation process.
And she's on track to do so. During Kavanaugh's confirmation, Senator Collins called for an investigation that gave her cover for the critical vote she cast in his favor - but reporting revealed the investigation was tightly controlled by the White House and did not include interviews with key witnesses. And this week, Collins voted against subpoenaing key witnesses and White House documents in the Senate impeachment trial.
**We 've had ENOUGH of Susan Collins sweeping facts under the rug. Have you?**
**[Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign to defeat Susan Collins. We can beat her - together.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ec4/4bef7a87/6abe633c/287f8b81/1678673949/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjMtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200123-2-full")**
**********[CHIP IN](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ec4/4bef7a87/6abe633c/287f8b81/1678673949/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjMtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200123-2-full")**********
We're not done fighting for a fair impeachment trial and a Senator we can trust to do what's right. Hopefully you aren't either.
\- Team Sara

South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Francis Conole
subject: Tell Katko: serve your country, not your party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | One of the most important aspects of serving your country and your community is to put it before petty personal and partisan concerns.

Rep. John Katko has failed to stand up to Trump time and time again -- even when standing with Trump has meant support for endangering the national security of the United States.

[**As your representative, I will always put what 's right for our families and our country first. Add your name to join me in asking Katko to act with courage and put what's good for America over what's good for Donald Trump!**](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/country-over-party?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+As+your+representative+I+will+always+put&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_180DO_200123_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_180DO_200123_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_180DO_200123_1_1") [**Tell Katko: Put America First ->**](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/country-over-party?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Tell+Katko+Put+America+First+rarr&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_180DO_200123_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_180DO_200123_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_180DO_200123_1_1") Katko's vote to side with lenders who exploit soldiers with high-interest loans is such a telling example of his conduct in Congress.

Politicians like him, who rely on unlimited dark money, are counting on the fact that veterans like me won't call them out when they betray the men and women who serve our country.

For me, that makes calling it out even more important.

[**Tell Congressman Katko to put what 's good for America ahead of what's good for Donald Trump!**](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/country-over-party?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Tell+Congressman+Katko+to+put+whatrsquos&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_180DO_200123_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_180DO_200123_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_180DO_200123_1_1")

Thank you for standing up for our country.

Francis

|

name: Team Warren
subject: 2-minute survey for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
During this campaign, Elizabeth's spoken to hundreds of thousands of supporters all across the country -- at town halls, in her calls to grassroots donors, and (of course) in selfie lines -- to... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a72c/45c30650/1e0497997/66e163a7/3017110205/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Elizabeth is fighting for a future where Washington doesn't just work for the wealthy and well-connected -- where your voice is always heard.

And during this campaign, she's spoken to hundreds of thousands of supporters all across the country -- at town halls, in her calls to grassroots donors, and (of course) in selfie lines -- to hear about what issues matter most to them and why they're in this fight.

clean_body: During this campaign, Elizabeth's spoken to hundreds of thousands of supporters all across the country -- at town halls, in her calls to grassroots donors, and (of course) in selfie lines -- to... | | | "" Elizabeth is fighting for a future where Washington doesn't just work for the wealthy and well-connected -- where your voice is always heard. And during this campaign, she's spoken to hundreds of thousands of supporters all across the country -- at town halls, in her calls to grassroots donors, and (of course) in selfie lines -- to hear about what issues matter most to them and why they're in this fight. Even though Elizabeth can't sit down with every supporter (she wishes she could!) we want to give you an opportunity to tell her what's on your mind, too.
